arts.ttl: Club have ‘started negotiations’ to sign Southampton player – Things look to be moving fast
arts.sum: Earlier today, Gianluca Di Marzio reported Genoa have identified Southampton’s Kamaldeen Sulemana as the ‘favourite’ target to improve their attack in the winter market. He also said the winger’s profile fits perfectly into what Genoa manager Patrick Vieira is looking for. Saturday’s edition of Gazzetta dello Sport backs up part of Di Marzio’s claim and The post Club have ‘started negotiations’ to sign Southampton player – Things look to be moving fast appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Barcelona Transfer News: Blaugrana braced for painful Ronald Araujo sale - Fabrizio Romano
arts.sum: According to Fabrizio Romano, Barcelona have been aware of Juventus' interest since last week, and the Bianconeri are now ready to take their pursuit of Araujo into the next gear. Barcelona are braced for formal negotiations with Juventus over Ronald Araujo, according to Fabrizio Romano.

arts.ttl: Barcelona name Ronald Araújo asking price after rejecting opening Juventus offer
arts.sum: The brass at La Liga giants Barcelona have laid out their demands to their counterparts at Juventus, over a potential January deal for Ronald Araújo. This comes amid a concerted…

arts.ttl: Preview: Southampton vs. Swansea City - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Sunday's FA Cup clash between Southampton and Swansea City, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
